Program_Description: Our Home Visiting Program offers support right in your home, using the Parents as Teachers model to support parents in understanding their child's growth and development.
Application_Process: If you are interested in participating, please fill out the registration form.

Program_Description: The Home Visiting Program offers support right in your home, using the Parents as Teachers model to promote positive parenting behaviors.
Target_Population: Expectant parents and families with children from birth through age 3 (or 5 in some cases)

Program_Description: WIC helps income-eligible families access healthy food and nutrition education.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant women, breastfeeding women, and parents or guardians of children up to five years old
Eligibility_Requirements: Must be a pregnant woman, breastfeeding woman, or a parent/guardian of a child under 5; may qualify if receiving Medi-Cal, CalWORKs, or CalFresh benefits.

Program_Description: WIC helps income-eligible families access healthy food and nutrition education.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children up to their fifth birthday
Eligibility_Requirements: Must be a pregnant woman, breastfeeding woman, or a parent/guardian of a child under 5; may qualify if receiving Medi-Cal, CalWORKs, or CalFresh benefits.
